name: GH_DocUndoEventArgs
summary: These arguments are passed along with UndoStateChanged events on GH_Document.

properties.name: Document
properties.summary: Gets the document that raised the event.

properties.name: Operation
properties.summary: Gets the type of undo operation that caused this event.

properties.name: Record
properties.summary: Gets the UndoRecord pertaining to this event. Not every Event type has a single record associated with it so be sure to test for null.
